name: io.github.jcjc-dev/beli-mcp
description: MCP server for Beli — log in once, then search places, rank reviews, manage photos and bookmarks via tools.

environmentVariables.name: BELI_PHONE
environmentVariables.description: Beli account phone in E.164 (e.g. +15551234567). Optional — prefer `npx beli-mcp login`.

environmentVariables.name: BELI_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Beli account password. Optional — prefer `npx beli-mcp login`. Never stored; only tokens are persisted.

environmentVariables.name: BELI_ALLOW_WRITES
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to allow write tools without a per-call confirm flag.
